Added clarity about what a clock event represents (clock-in/clock-out), authentication requirements, expected input structure, response details, and side effects (recording in system and updating user records). data.summary_suggestion: Create a new clock event record
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new ClockEvent resource to record a clock-in or clock-out event. Requires authentication via PARiMAuth. Accepts a ClockEvent object with required fields such as user ID, event type, and timestamp. Returns the created ClockEvent resource with a 201 status code and includes the assigned resource ID. This operation records the event in the system and updates user clocking records.

data.current_summary: Retrieves the collection of User resources.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a collection of all User resources from the system. Requires authentication via PARiMAuth. Supports filtering, pagination, and sorting through query parameters.
